capture_blocks.objective: confirm that AP state, UART capture, and block-event logging are stable before the longer support windows
operator_instructions: Stay outside the controlled path between AP and ESP32-C5.
Do not move the chair, AP, table, ESP32-C5, or cables.
If raw UART output or AP state looks unstable, stop before E1.
capture_blocks.scenario: technical warm-up and raw-stream sanity check before the D03 support capture

capture_blocks.objective: collect a longer empty control segment suitable for later comparator baselines
operator_instructions: Leave the controlled 2.00 m path between AP and ESP32-C5.
If possible, leave the room or stand far enough to avoid affecting the radio path.
Keep the room layout unchanged and avoid nearby activity.
capture_blocks.scenario: extended empty reference for local-features and raw-central comparison

capture_blocks.objective: capture a longer static-presence window for the later comparator surfaces
operator_instructions: Enter the midpoint of the controlled path between AP and ESP32-C5.
Stand almost still with a natural posture.
Do not touch the chair, AP, table, or cables.

capture_blocks.objective: capture a longer slow-motion window for later raw-central and local-feature comparisons
operator_instructions: Stay within the same controlled path between AP and ESP32-C5.
Move slowly back and forth without leaving the corridor.
Do not change the topology of the stand.

capture_blocks.objective: check the reverse transition back to empty with a longer recovery segment
operator_instructions: Leave the controlled path again.
If possible, leave the room or stand far enough to avoid affecting the radio path.
Keep the room layout unchanged.
capture_blocks.scenario: extended empty recovery after the first long cycle

capture_blocks.objective: provide an in-session repeat for the static-presence support data
operator_instructions: Return to the midpoint of the controlled path.
Stand almost still in approximately the same position as in S1.
Avoid any extra motion not needed for the block.
capture_blocks.scenario: second extended static presence support segment

capture_blocks.objective: provide an in-session repeat for the slow-motion support data
operator_instructions: Stay within the same controlled path used in M1.
Repeat the same slow motion pattern as closely as practical.
Do not move chairs, table, AP, ESP32-C5, or cables.

capture_blocks.objective: finish the support set with a second long empty reference for block-aware analysis
operator_instructions: Leave the controlled path one final time.
If possible, leave the room or stand far enough to avoid affecting the radio path.
Keep the room layout unchanged until the capture is stopped.
capture_blocks.scenario: final extended empty recovery for comparator anchoring

config.description: D03 full support capture on the current single-link stand for later comparator analysis.
operator_notes: Full support capture recorded on the same physical stand as D01.
Human-present blocks were performed by a single participant.
Keep the primary prplOS-compatible dual-band AP node on 5 GHz / channel 36 / 20 MHz.
Preserve the raw full-rate capture because later raw-central and local-feature comparators must use the same material.

honesty_notes: Preserve raw full-rate capture because later raw-central comparison must run on the same material.
Do not claim completed D03 if any support blocks are missing.

scripts.description: Check local WSL/Linux dependencies and capture-device visibility.
Apply the requested router radio, SSID, and AccessPoint settings.
Collect router-side snapshots over SSH or serial console.
Build the configured ESP32 firmware workspace.
Flash the configured ESP32 firmware workspace.
Capture the ESP32 serial stream for the configured duration.
Run a continuous serial capture and pause for operator confirmation between configured capture blocks.
Run preflight, AP setup, AP snapshot, and then the interactive operator-guided capture sequence.
